tweet.text: RT @BuzzFeed: What The Best Picture Oscar Nominees Would Look Like If They Had Pugs In Them http://t.co/bvHcHdEr4W http://t.co/Psipzfgq6j
Speaking of pugs - it's March 1 today. Our oldest pug Romeo is a leap year pug so we celebrate his bday yesterday AND today! He is 6...
...and has kept me sane through tough times. Amazing dog. Here's a puppy pic at 10 weeks w/ my wife (gf at the time) http://t.co/cnBZfJrD94
